# CWE-323 safe — Reusing a Nonce, Key Pair in Encryption (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-323-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"io"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func SealUserBlob(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, plaintext []byte) error {
	key := []byte("0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
	block, _ := aes.NewCipher(key)
	aead, _ := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	nonce := make([]byte, aead.NonceSize())
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	ciphertext := aead.Seal(nil, nonce, plaintext, nil)
	payload := append(nonce, ciphertext...)
	return db.Exec("UPDATE users SET blob = ? WHERE id = ?", payload, c.Query("id")).Error
}
